title.en: They took out the remaining two-thirds of the p...

content.en:
"The reincarnation domain is a prison!"

The overlords of the Origin Upper Realm of the Reincarnation Origin Clan said bitterly.

The picture transmitted by the ancestor before his fall was a prison, with endless rules, turning into a prison and blocking the entire reincarnation domain.

No, even the land of eternity, the ruins of reincarnation, is probably part of the inside of the prison.

"If the reincarnation domain is a prison, then the reason why we can't break through may be that we are restricted, and whoever breaks through will !!have to die," Jaw Ancestor said helplessly.

"That's not necessarily!" Yizu said: "The ancestor broke through in half a step and shattered a fragment of the prison, proving that this prison is not indestructible, and if you can break through in half a step, you can break through completely, but we haven't found the right path yet, so there is no need to completely despair!"

Then.

They took out the remaining two-thirds of the pieces.

"This is the Prison Fragment!"

They silently came to their senses.

"This rule ......"

They found that the rules of the prison overrode the rules of the reincarnation domain, but not the rules of the origin of reincarnation!

Whether it is the Origin Rules of the Other Shore of the Eternal Land, or the Origin Rules of Reincarnation of the Reincarnation Domain, they are far inferior to the rules contained in the fragments of the prison.

"If we comprehend the rules contained in this fragment, will we be able to break through to a higher realm?"

Jaw Zu said.

"It's possible!" the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords said slightly.

"It's a pity that this fragment doesn't contain many rules, and if we are allowed to understand it, I am afraid that we may not be able to understand it. An Origin Upper Realm Overlord frowned.

"If we create a formation that allows us to peek into the prison, then we will have countless years to understand this rule!"

Yizu said.

"It's too difficult!" the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords shook their heads.

After the ancestor broke through in half a step, he was able to split the reincarnation domain, slash on the prison, and spied on the prison.

However, it was only when the Ancestor exhausted his strength that he could spy on this scene, how could they possibly be able to spy on it!

If they have a way to spy on it, their strength is definitely comparable to that of a half-step breakthrough.

"Yes, it's too difficult, if you want to create that kind of formation, it's not easier than really breaking through!"

"Then you can only understand the rules on this fragment first!"

Subsequently.

They began to silently comprehend the rules of the fragment.

......

On the side of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, the group of Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords are also contemplating the rules of the Fragments.

But.

This kind of rule is too advanced and too difficult to comprehend.

Even if they used up this fragment, they didn't want to comprehend a single bit of it.

And when this group of Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords comprehended the rules on the fragments, the news about the fragments didn't know where it came from.

However, those weak Origin Upper Realm Overlords naturally did not dare to covet the fragments.

However, Ye Tian was extremely interested in this fragment, but it was a pity that his current strength had not reached the level of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and he could not participate in it.

However.

By chance, he knew that the Reincarnation Celestial Clan had snatched one-third of the fragments, and there was a special rule contained in the fragments.

After a while.

Ye Tian came to visit Yazu, who had just come out of the customs, mainly to learn a little bit about the fragments from Yazu.

After coming to Yazu's palace and chatting with Yazu for a while, Ye Tian asked: "Lord Yazu, it is said that our reincarnation celestial clan snatched one-third of the fragments from the reincarnation source domain, which is the fragment that the ancestor cut out from the depths of the reincarnation domain, what is the mystery of that fragment?"

Every reincarnation celestial clan is very curious about fragments, and Ye Tian has no problem asking this question, and it will not arouse suspicion.

Yazu smiled: "If you asked me at the beginning, I would definitely not answer, but now, it doesn't hurt to tell you." We don't know exactly what that fragment is, but we know that there are special rules inside. According to our guess, this fragment should be something outside the reincarnation domain, and that rule overrides the original rule of reincarnation. "

"Rules beyond the rules of the origin of reincarnation?"

Ye Tian was taken aback.

In this way, this kind of rule must also surpass the original rules of the other side, because in essence, the original rules of the other side are similar to the rules of the origin of reincarnation, and even the rules of the origin of reincarnation are more powerful.

Referring to this kind of rule, he thought of the cracks inside the body of the Origin Ancestor, and the aura of the rules revealed seemed to be very special, but like the rootless source, it was also assimilated by the land of eternity, and there was no transcendence, no value for enlightenment.

But the rules contained in this fragment are called by Yazu as the original rules beyond reincarnation, which must be complete rules, not weakened rules.

"Lord Azu, can I go to enlightenment?"

Ye Tian asked.

"No!" Yazu shook his head, "We, the overlords of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm, have all gone to enlightenment, but none of them have come to enlightenment, and the rules contained in it have consumed a lot, and we can't stand to comprehend again, we have sealed it up, and we don't allow any members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan to comprehend." "

"It's a pity!"

Ye Tian originally wanted to participate in enlightenment, and felt that with his status as a replica body of Ao Chen, he was really qualified to participate in enlightenment.

But I didn't expect that there were not many rules left in the fragments, and the reincarnation celestial clan was sealed and not allowed to participate in enlightenment, no matter how high his status was, it was useless!

Immediately, Ye Tian asked again: "Lord Yazu, can you still get this kind of fragment again?"

The sub-clan shook his head: "Definitely not good, the group of guys from the reincarnation source clan will definitely go to enlightenment, but even if it is to give enlightenment to an Origin Upper Realm overlord who has broken the boundary of the nine origins, it is useless, it will be exhausted." Therefore, there is no point in snatching their pieces. As for getting the fragments again, then you have to follow the example of the ancestor, complete the semi-breakthrough, and then slash the reincarnation domain, maybe you can get that kind of fragment. But sacrificing a Nine-Time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, just to get this fragment, there is no need for this!"

Ye Tian thought about it, and he also felt that there was a good way.

Suddenly.

He thought of the Origin Ancestor.

How powerful the Origin Ancestor was, at the level of the Ninth Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, he swept through the invincible, killing so many Reincarnation Heavenly Clans and Reincarnation Origin Clans, so that they could not help the Origin Ancestor when they united.

It is conceivable that after the half-breakthrough of the Origin Ancestor, it must be above the half-breakthrough Ancestor.

The Origin Ancestor broke through half a step and changed the rules of the land on the other side of eternity before he died, how terrifying is this kind of strength, he didn't break the land of the other side of eternity, take a peek?

"Maybe the Origin Ancestor did the same as the Ancestor before he died, or maybe he also obtained this kind of fragment, or even more, but the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Eternal Beyond was too weak to take those treasures at that time, and he couldn't even connect to the physical body. "

Ye Tian guessed.

If this is really the case, after his strength increases, he may be able to enter the physical world of the Origin Ancestor again and find the possible fragments.
